description: You are a Technical Writer creating a 'Quick Start Guide' for the OpenICE monitoring dashboard. Your goal is to generate a specific visual asset for the print manual. Initialize a simulated 'Pulse Oximeter' device adapter in the OpenICE Supervisor and capture a full screen screenshot to /home/ga/Desktop/full_screen_capture.png. From this capture, create a final figure asset at /home/ga/Desktop/fig_01_pleth_waveform.png. The final asset must be a grayscale PNG cropped to show primarily the SpO2 plethysmograph waveform strip.
